101 5 10
10 111 2
111 10 2
0 0 2
999 999 10
7 3 10

# zeros / identity
0 12345 10
12345 0 10
0 1 2
1 0 2

# single digits
1 1 2
1 1 10
9 9 10
8 7 10
1 1 3
2 2 3

# simple base 2
1 1 2
10 1 2
11 1 2
101 10 2
111 1 2

# carry heavy
9999 1 10
999999999 1 10
1111111111 1 2
2222222222 1 3

# unequal lengths
1 999999999999999999999999 10
123 999999999999999999999999 10
1 111111111111111111111111 2
101 111111111111111111111111 2

# base 2 random-ish
101010101010 111100001111 2
111000111000 101010101010 2
1100110011001100 1010101010101010 2

# base 3
102 21 3
2222 1111 3
120102 21021 3

# base 4
123 321 4
3333 1 4
1023 2301 4

# base 5
4444 1 5
1234 4321 5
10101 40404 5

# base 6
5555 1 6
12345 54321 6

# base 7
6666 1 7
123456 654321 7

# base 8
7777 1 8
1234567 7654321 8

# base 9
8888 1 9
12345678 87654321 9

# base 10 normal
123456789 987654321 10
111111111 222222222 10
1000000000 1 10

# division exact
100 10 10
144 12 10
1000 10 10
1110 10 2

# division non-exact
5 2 10
7 3 10
10 3 10
111 10 2
1010 11 2

# division edge
1 2 10
2 3 10
10 11 10
1 10 2

# leading zeros
000123 0456 10
0001 0 10
001 001 2

# karatsuba medium
12345678901234567890 98765432109876543210 10
11111111111111111111 22222222222222222222 10
99999999999999999999 88888888888888888888 10

# karatsuba binary large
110110101011011010101101 101011011010110101011011 2
111111111111111111111111 111111111111111111111111 2

# stress uneven split
123456789012345678901234567890 12345 10
999999999999999999999999999999 1 10
1 999999999999999999999999999999 10

# very large (near limit ~100 digits)
99999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999999 1 10
11111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111 1 2

# tricky subtraction inside karatsuba
10000000000000000000 9999999999999999999 10
100000000000000000000000 1 10

# mixed patterns
10101010101010101010 01010101010101010101 2
1234123412341234 4321432143214321 5
